'''âj-l-g''' ('''kajalag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phagocytize|phagocytize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phagocytize|phagocytize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| kajalag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijalag|thijalag]] || [[word:jijalag|jijalag]] || [[word:shijalag|shijalag]] || [[word:kijalag|kijalag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujalag|thuthujalag]] || [[word:jujujalag|jujujalag]] || [[word:shushujalag|shushujalag]] || [[word:kukujalag|kukujalag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujalag|thujalag]] || [[word:jujalag|jujalag]] || [[word:shujalag|shujalag]] || [[word:kujalag|kujalag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujalag|thujalag]] || [[word:jujalag|jujalag]] || [[word:shujalag|shujalag]] || [[word:kujalag|kujalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejalag|thejalag]] || [[word:jejalag|jejalag]] || [[word:shejalag|shejalag]] || [[word:kejalag|kejalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojalag|thothojalag]] || [[word:jojojalag|jojojalag]] || [[word:shoshojalag|shoshojalag]] || [[word:kokojalag|kokojalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojalag|thojalag]] || [[word:jojalag|jojalag]] || [[word:shojalag|shojalag]] || [[word:kojalag|kojalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojalag|thojalag]] || [[word:jojalag|jojalag]] || [[word:shojalag|shojalag]] || [[word:kojalag|kojalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjalag|thĂŠjalag]] || [[word:jĂŠjalag|jĂŠjalag]] || [[word:shĂŠjalag|shĂŠjalag]] || [[word:kĂŠjalag|kĂŠjalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajalag|thathajalag]] || [[word:jajajalag|jajajalag]] || [[word:shashajalag|shashajalag]] || [[word:kakajalag|kakajalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajalag|thajalag]] || [[word:jajalag|jajalag]] || [[word:shajalag|shajalag]] || [[word:kajalag|kajalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajalag|thajalag]] || [[word:jajalag|jajalag]] || [[word:shajalag|shajalag]] || [[word:kajalag|kajalag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajalag|shajalag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajalag|goshajalag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajalag|gokishajalag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajalagnĂŒ|shajalagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajalagnknĂŒ|goshajalagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalagnĂŒ|gokishajalagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajalagshĂ«|shajalagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajalagnkshĂ«|goshajalagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajalagshĂ«|gokishajalagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalagro|shajalagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalagnkro|goshajalagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalagro|gokishajalagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalagmu|shajalagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalagnkmu|goshajalagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalagmu|gokishajalagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajalagsher|shajalagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajalagnksher|goshajalagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajalagsher|gokishajalagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajalagng|shajalagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajalagnkng|goshajalagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajalagng|gokishajalagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajalagya|shajalagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajalagnkya|goshajalagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajalagya|gokishajalagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajalagyam|shajalagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajalagnkyam|goshajalagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajalagyam|gokishajalagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajalagnĂŒshĂ«|shajalagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajalagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajalagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajalagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajalagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalagnĂŒro|shajalagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalagnknĂŒro|goshajalagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalagnĂŒro|gokishajalagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalagnĂŒmu|shajalagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalagnknĂŒmu|goshajalagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalagnĂŒmu|gokishajalagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajalagshĂ«nĂŒ|shajalagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajalagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajalagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajalagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalagshĂ«ro|shajalagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalagnkshĂ«ro|goshajalagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalagshĂ«ro|gokishajalagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalagshĂ«mu|shajalagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalagnkshĂ«mu|goshajalagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalagshĂ«mu|gokishajalagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajalagronĂŒ|shajalagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajalagnkronĂŒ|goshajalagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalagronĂŒ|gokishajalagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajalagroshĂ«|shajalagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajalagnkroshĂ«|goshajalagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajalagroshĂ«|gokishajalagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalagromu|shajalagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalagnkromu|goshajalagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalagromu|gokishajalagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajalagmunĂŒ|shajalagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajalagnkmunĂŒ|goshajalagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalagmunĂŒ|gokishajalagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajalagmushĂ«|shajalagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajalagnkmushĂ«|goshajalagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajalagmushĂ«|gokishajalagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalagmuro|shajalagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalagnkmuro|goshajalagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalagmuro|gokishajalagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
